wave_2_pending.objective: Deploy-and-verify pipeline (db push, functions deploy, curl smoke tests, browser-MCP UAT, write 05-VERIFICATION.md)

remaining_tasks.name: Wait for Wave 1 agents → merge worktrees → run pre-commit hooks → npm test smoke gate → update tracking
code_review_gate → regression_gate → schema_drift_gate → verify_phase_goal → close phase in ROADMAP/STATE

blockers.description: 3 background executor agents may still be running in worktrees — their state at resume time is unknown
blockers.workaround: On resume: inspect each worktree's SUMMARY.md and git log; if agents completed, run merge step; if not, abort + restart Wave 1

human_actions_pending.action: Confirm whether to wait for in-flight agents or abort and restart Wave 1
human_actions_pending.context: Agents were dispatched in background mode immediately before pause

human_actions_pending.action: Wave 2 (05-04) requires user interaction for deploy steps + browser-MCP UAT
human_actions_pending.context: supabase db push, functions deploy, and 5 UAT scenarios are not autonomous

decisions.decision: Use parallel worktree execution for Wave 1
decisions.rationale: config parallelization=true, no files_modified overlap across 05-01/02/03, cleaner isolation than sequential

decisions.decision: Cleaned 5 stale worktree directories from .claude/worktrees/ before dispatch
decisions.rationale: EEXIST mkdir error blocked first dispatch; stale worktrees were leftovers from earlier sessions (Apr 24-25). Safe to remove — git worktree prune confirmed gitdir files were already gone.

next_action: On resume: 1) Run `git worktree list` and check each worktree for SUMMARY.md commits. 2) If all 3 SUMMARY.md files exist with --no-verify commits → continue from Wave-1 merge step (read execute-phase.md step 5.5 onwards). 3) If any worktree is incomplete → `git worktree remove --force` all three, delete temp branches, then re-run `/gsd-execute-phase 5` from scratch (idempotent — all 3 plans use file-create or full-rewrite operations).
context_notes: Phase 5 = milestone v1.1 first phase, security hardening. 4 plans across 2 waves. EXPECTED_BASE captured at 8f57a0b before dispatch. Plan files contain verbatim SQL/TS that executors copy-paste — tasks are deterministic. No checkpoints in Wave 1; Wave 2 (05-04) is the deploy gate with user-facing steps.

anti_patterns.pattern: Stale worktree dirs from prior sessions block new dispatches
anti_patterns.manifestation: EEXIST mkdir on first agent dispatch; resolved by `rm -rf .claude/worktrees/agent-*` and `git worktree prune`
anti_patterns.prevention: Pre-flight check: list & clean .claude/worktrees/ before dispatching parallel agents
